INSERT DATA { :p1 a Person; Person.name 'Alice'; Person.age 30. };
INSERT DATA { :p2 a Person; Person.name 'Bob'; Person.age 25. };
INSERT DATA { :a1 a Address; Address.city 'New York'; Address.country 'USA'. };
INSERT DATA { :a2 a Address; Address.city 'Los Angeles'; Address.country 'USA'. };
INSERT { :p1 Address.address :a1; :p2 Address.address :a2. } WHERE { BIND(:p1 AS ?p1) BIND(:p2 AS ?p2) };
SELECT ?name WHERE { ?p a Person; ?p Person.name ?name. FILTER(?name = 'Alice' && EXISTS { ?p Address.address ?addr. }) };
SELECT ?name ?city WHERE { ?p a Person; ?p Person.name ?name; ?a Address.address ?p; ?a Address.city ?city. FILTER(?name = 'Bob' && ?city = 'Los Angeles') };
SELECT ?name WHERE { ?p a Person; ?p Person.name ?name. FILTER(?p Person.age 20 && ?p Person.age 30) };
SELECT ?name ?city WHERE { ?p a Person; ?p Person.name ?name; ?a Address.address ?p; ?a Address.city ?city. FILTER(?name = 'Alice' && ?city = 'New York' && ?p Person.age > 20) };
SELECT ?name WHERE { ?p a Person; ?p Person.name ?name. FILTER(?p Person.age > 20 && ?p Person.age < 30) } ORDER BY ?name;
SELECT ?name WHERE { ?p a Person; ?p Person.name ?name. FILTER(?p Person.age > 20 && NOT EXISTS { ?p1 a Person; ?p1 Person.age < 20; FILTER(?p1 = ?p) }) };
